description: Semantic mapping for Oracle EBS GL tables to business concepts.

tables.description: Stores batch information for journals. Journals are often grouped into batches for processing.

columns.name: JE_BATCH_ID
columns.description: Unique identifier for the batch (Primary Key).

columns.name: NAME
columns.description: The name of the batch.

columns.name: STATUS
columns.description: Status of the batch (P = Posted, U = Unposted).

columns.name: POSTED_DATE
columns.description: The date the batch was posted to the GL.

columns.name: DEFAULT_PERIOD_NAME
columns.description: The accounting period (e.g., JAN-24).

tables.description: Stores header information for individual journal entries.

columns.name: JE_HEADER_ID
columns.description: Unique identifier for the journal header (Primary Key).

columns.name: JE_BATCH_ID
columns.description: Foreign Key to GL_JE_BATCHES.

columns.name: NAME
columns.description: The name of the journal entry.

columns.name: DESCRIPTION
columns.description: Description of the journal entry purpose.

columns.name: LEDGER_ID
columns.description: Foreign Key to GL_LEDGERS (Identifies the set of books).

columns.name: CURRENCY_CODE
columns.description: Currency of the journal (e.g., USD).

columns.name: JE_SOURCE
columns.description: Source of the journal (e.g., Manual, Payables, Receivables).

columns.name: JE_CATEGORY
columns.description: Category of the journal (e.g., Adjustment, Accrual).

tables.description: Stores the individual debit and credit lines for a journal entry.

columns.name: JE_HEADER_ID
columns.description: Foreign Key to GL_JE_HEADERS.

columns.name: JE_LINE_NUM
columns.description: Line number within the journal.

columns.name: CODE_COMBINATION_ID
columns.description: Foreign Key to GL_CODE_COMBINATIONS (The GL Account string).

columns.name: ENTERED_DR
columns.description: Debit amount in the transaction currency.

columns.name: ENTERED_CR
columns.description: Credit amount in the transaction currency.

columns.name: ACCOUNTED_DR
columns.description: Debit amount in the functional currency.

columns.name: ACCOUNTED_CR
columns.description: Credit amount in the functional currency.

columns.name: DESCRIPTION
columns.description: Description of the line.

tables.description: Stores the valid combinations of segment values that make up a full GL account string.

columns.name: CODE_COMBINATION_ID
columns.description: Unique identifier for the account combination (Primary Key).

columns.name: SEGMENT1
columns.description: Typically the Company or Entity segment.

columns.name: SEGMENT2
columns.description: Typically the Cost Center or Department segment.

columns.name: SEGMENT3
columns.description: Typically the Account (Natural Account) segment.

columns.name: ACCOUNT_TYPE
columns.description: Type of account (A=Asset, L=Liability, R=Revenue, E=Expense, O=Owner's Equity).

columns.name: ENABLED_FLAG
columns.description: Whether the combination is active (Y/N).

tables.description: Stores period-to-date and year-to-date balances for account combinations.

columns.name: LEDGER_ID
columns.description: Foreign Key to GL_LEDGERS.

columns.name: CODE_COMBINATION_ID
columns.description: Foreign Key to GL_CODE_COMBINATIONS.

columns.name: PERIOD_NAME
columns.description: The accounting period (e.g., JAN-24).

columns.name: PERIOD_NET_DR
columns.description: Net debit activity for the period.

columns.name: PERIOD_NET_CR
columns.description: Net credit activity for the period.

columns.name: BEGIN_BALANCE_DR
columns.description: Beginning debit balance for the period.

columns.name: BEGIN_BALANCE_CR
columns.description: Beginning credit balance for the period.

tables.description: Defines the accounting setup (Chart of Accounts, Currency, Calendar, Accounting Method).

columns.name: LEDGER_ID
columns.description: Unique identifier for the ledger (Primary Key).

columns.name: NAME
columns.description: The name of the ledger (e.g., US Primary Ledger).

columns.name: SHORT_NAME
columns.description: Short name for reports.

columns.name: CURRENCY_CODE
columns.description: The functional currency for the ledger.

example_queries.description: Get all lines for a specific journal entry, including account segments and amounts.
example_queries.sql: SELECT l.JE_LINE_NUM, c.SEGMENT1, c.SEGMENT2, c.SEGMENT3, l.ENTERED_DR, l.ENTERED_CR FROM GL_JE_LINES l JOIN GL_CODE_COMBINATIONS c ON l.CODE_COMBINATION_ID = c.CODE_COMBINATION_ID WHERE l.JE_HEADER_ID = :je_header_id

example_queries.description: Get period-to-date balances for all accounts in a specific ledger and period.
example_queries.sql: SELECT c.SEGMENT1, c.SEGMENT2, c.SEGMENT3, b.PERIOD_NET_DR, b.PERIOD_NET_CR FROM GL_BALANCES b JOIN GL_CODE_COMBINATIONS c ON b.CODE_COMBINATION_ID = c.CODE_COMBINATION_ID WHERE b.LEDGER_ID = :ledger_id AND b.PERIOD_NAME = :period_name
